testcase.name: Study Session with Cleanup › @slow can complete study session with various grades
testcase.system-out: Created deck for study: ef892a4b-ae26-47d9-8b8e-5f99c9e545e3 Reviewed card 1 with grade 4 Reviewed card 2 with grade 2 Reviewed card 3 with grade 5 Study session completed successfully Cleaned up deck: ef892a4b-ae26-47d9-8b8e-5f99c9e545e3

testcase.name: Study Session with Cleanup › @slow can navigate between cards and complete session
testcase.system-out: Created math deck: 603109b8-0d18-4a3b-9701-1fc1fe02d2f0 Reviewed first card with grade 5 Reviewed second card with grade 4 Study session completed with 2 cards Cleaned up deck: 603109b8-0d18-4a3b-9701-1fc1fe02d2f0
